items.title: The political strategist who became Starmer's right-hand man
items.description: McSweeney, long considered instrumental to the rise of the PM, derived his power and influence from his track record as a political strategist.

items.title: US skier Vonn 'deserved better ending' as crash ends Olympic dream
items.description: American superstar skier Lindsey Vonn "deserved a better ending" after suffering heartbreak in what could be her final Olympic event as she crashes in...

items.title: Norway's Klaebo wins first of potential six golds at Games
items.description: After eight matches and five days of competition at the Winter Olympics, Bruce Mouat and Jen Dodds are finally beaten in Cortina.

items.title: Japan's governing party projected to win snap election majority
items.description: A coalition led by current Prime Minister Sanae Takaichi is expected to clinch a decisive win, according to media projections after polls closed.

items.title: England deny Nepal in final-ball World Cup thriller
items.description: England fight from the brink to avoid a major shock and beat an inspired Nepal by four runs in their opening match of the T20 World Cup in Mumbai.
